heading: Acceptance of donations of lands
label: 423a Acceptance of donations of lands
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to accept, on behalf of the United States, donations of lands, interests therein, or rights pertaining thereto required for the Petersburg National Battlefield.
notes: Change of Name“Petersburg National Battlefield” substituted in text for “Petersburg National Military Park” pursuant to . See .Pub. L. 87–603section 423h–1 of this title
Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 423 of this title
